caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, black headphones, and a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" is seated in a professional studio setting. He is positioned in front of a microphone and a black office chair. The background features white panels with logos and text, including "HUSTLE" under stars and "BOSS TALK 101" in large red and black letters. A small logo on the left side of the screen reads "PODCAST" below a stylized graphic. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking into the microphone. In the beginning, he is gesturing with his right hand near his face, and as time progresses, he shifts his gaze and head position, looking slightly to his left while continuing to talk. He wears a gold chain and a gold watch on his wrist. The camera remains stationary, capturing the man from the waist up.
